DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE BY PERSONAL DELIVERY OR OVERNIGHT DELIVERY PLAINTIFF WITH THE COMPLETE OPPOSITION, INCLUDING ALL EXHIBITS, BY MARCH 6, 2014 AT 5:00 PM. DEFENDANT SHALL FILE PROOF OF SERVICE NO LATER THAN MARCH 7, 2014 AT 4 PM. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY BRIEF BY MARCH 11, 2014. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN PILLETTE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. FIRST, MR. PILLETTE FAILED TO OBTAIN A HEARING DATE AND RESERVATION NUMBER PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 8.2A(2)(B). SECOND, THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. (CCP 1005(B).) THE MOTION WAS FILED ON FEBRUARY 27, 2014. MR. PILLETTE ONLY PROVIDED 4 COURT DAYS NOTICE. THIRD, MR. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR OPPOSITION TO THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING ON THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. JOHN PILLETTE IS ENJOINED FROM: (1) PERFORMING ANY FURTHER CONSTRUCTION WORK IN UNIT 203 WITHOUT THE APPROVAL OF THE BELGRAVIA HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ("BHA") PURSUANT TO THE COVENANTS, CONDITIONS, AND RESTRICTIONS (CC&RS), ARTICLE VII, PARAGRAPH 5; AND (2) PREVENTING BHA, ACCOMPANIED BY A SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF, FROM ENTERING UNIT 203 ON MARCH 21, 2014 AT 10:00 AM IN ORDER TO INSPECT ANY CONSTRUCTION WORK PURSUANT TO CC&RS, ARTICLE VI, PARAGRAPH 3. THIS PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SHALL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL A FINAL RESOLUTION ON THE MERITS OF THIS MATTER IS REACHED. BHA SHALL POST A BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 1,000 PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 529 WITHIN FIVE DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. BHA'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance nor opposition to the Court's tentative ruling, the Court adopts its tentative ruling on the ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. John Pillette is enjoined from: (1) performing any further construction work in Unit 203 without the approval of the Belgravia Homeowners Association ("BHA") pursuant to the Covenants, Conditions, and Restrictions (CC&Rs), Article VII, Paragraph 5; and (2) preventing BHA, accompanied by a San Francisco Sheriff, from entering Unit 203 on March 21, 2014 at 10:00 am in order to inspect any construction work pursuant to CC&Rs, Article VI, Paragraph 3. This preliminary injunction shall remain in effect until a final resolution on the merits of this matter is reached. BHA shall post a bond in the amount of $ 1,000 pursuant to CCP sec. 529 within five days of entry of this order. BHA's request for sanctions is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Continued To Mar-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing re: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is Continued to March 13, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to give Defendant the opportunity to serve Plaintiff with his opposition papers. Defendant shall serve by personal delivery or overnight delivery Plaintiff with the complete opposition, including all exhibits, by March 6, 2014 at 5:00 pm. Defendant shall file proof of service no later than March 7, 2014 at 4 pm. Plaintiff may file a supplemental reply brief by March 11, 2014. The Temporary Restraining Order remains in effect until the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN PILLETTE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Off calendar. First, Mr. Pillette failed to obtain a hearing date and reservation number pursuant to Local Rule 8.2A(2)(b). Second, the motion is untimely. (CCP 1005(b).) The motion was filed on February 27, 2014. Mr. Pillette only provided 4 court days notice. Third, Mr. Pillette did not timely file proof of service for the motion. (Cal. Rules of Court, rule 3.1300(c).) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Cler: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
